ocr.text: In the analysis of malaria cases across regions, Table 1 presents data on confirmed malaria cases, API, and microscopists. The
total confirmed malaria cases stand at 4984 (76.3%), with an API of 5.71 and 290 registered participants, including 50
microscopists (17.2%). The Northern region reports 200 confirmed cases (57.0%), an API of 0.60*, 115 registered participants,
and 28 microscopists (24.3%). Puerto Princesa City has 795 confirmed cases (71.2%), an API of 3.84, 30 registered
participants, and no microscopists (0%). The Southern region shows the highest confirmed cases at 3989 (78.3%), with an API
of 12.1*, 145 registered participants, and 22 microscopists (15.2%). Meanwhile, Table 2 summarizes observations over time.
The SDA + RPD category has values of 0.6 (0.7)a** at baseline, 0.3 (0.6) at 3-year, 0.7 (0.6)b*c* at 6-year, and 0.5 (0.6) at 9-
Region  Confirmed malaria cases  API  Microscopists
The SDA values are 0.4 (0.7) at baseline, 0.4 (0.6) at 3-year, 0.4 (0.6) at 6-year, and 0.5 (0.7) at 9-year. The SDA previous RPD
shows 0.4 (0.7) at baseline, 0.3 (0.6) at 3-year, 0.2 (0.4)b at 6-year, and 0.3 (0.4) at 9-year. Lastly, complete dentition presents
values of 0.2 (0.4)a at baseline, 0.3 (0.5) at 3-year, 0.3 (0.5)c at 6-year, and 0.4 (0.7) at 9-year.
